title: FSMM Shop Block
description: Shop/Vending Blocks for FSMM (Fex's Small Money Mod)
body:
This mod adds "Shop" blocks which you can use to trade with players using the FSMM currency.    
Infinite Admin shops are a feature too!


FSMM is a mod that allows you to have player and non player accounts as well as use Items as currency.
Meaning you can deposit your items into your account, or withdraw money in item form from your account.

## How to use the Shop block?    
If you place a shopblock, it has no "owner", to open "editor" UI, sneak+rightclick the block.    
You can also open the editor UI that way if you're the shop's owner or operator and in creative mode.    
    
If a shop is ready setup, players can access it and see the "trade" UI,
there they can sell or buy your items, the money is directly transferred to or from your account.    
    
If you want the Shop to use another account than your own, make sure to select one in the FSMM ATM as active **before** setting up the shop block!    
If you want later to access the "editor" UI, make sure to also select the account beforehand!

 

### FaQ:
Q: Does this work with modded pipes or hoppers?    
A: Yes.    

Q: Does this have dependencies?    
A: FCL (Fexcraft Common Library) and FSMM (Fex's Small Money Mod)
